name: lutrin-monorepo
description: Markdown → PowerPoint / HTML presentation compiler, themable: a generic default theme, organization brand kits distributed as .deckkit archives. CLI, VS Code extension, Obsidian plugin and agent skill.

scripts.site: node packages/core/src/cli.mjs build examples/demo.deck.md --html -o site/demo.html && node packages/core/src/cli.mjs build examples/demo.deck.md -o site/demo.pptx
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w lutrin-vscode && npm run typecheck -w lutrin-obsidian
scripts.build: npm run build -w lutrin-vscode && npm run build -w lutrin-obsidian

author: Julien Riel
